Cart.empty_description: It looks like you haven't added any adventures to your itinerary yet. The world awaits!

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.message: We have sent your booking details to {email}

Hero.title: Design your Mexico experience
Hero.subtitle: We create personalized itineraries so you can experience the best of each destination without worrying about logistics.

itineraries.title: Custom Itineraries
itineraries.desc: We design your trip day by day according to your interests, from adventures and beaches to gastronomy and culture.

bookings.title: Exclusive Bookings
bookings.desc: We manage your reservations at the best local spots, from authentic eateries to Michelin gourmet experiences.

transport.title: Transport Coordination
transport.desc: We organize airport-hotel transfers, car rentals, and private transport so you can move around hassle-free.

vip.title: VIP Access Tours
vip.desc: We manage your excursions and adventure activities with priority and exclusive access whenever possible.

concierge.title: Direct Contact
concierge.desc: You'll have direct contact with your concierge via chat or call for changes, questions, or instant recommendations.

local.title: Local Experiences
local.desc: Enjoy each destination like a true local, with experiences fully tailored to your days and preferences.

why_us.title: Why choose us?
why_us.subtitle: We take care of every detail so your only job is to enjoy the experience.

immediate.title: Immediate Action
immediate.desc: We design your trip day by day according to your interests, from adventures and beaches to gastronomy and culture.

experts.title: Local Experts
experts.desc: We know the most authentic and exclusive corners of Mexico. Access experiences you won't find in conventional travel guides.

planning.title: Perfect Planning
planning.desc: Transparent planning with no hidden fees. We design optimized routes so you can enjoy every minute of your stay stress-free.

care.title: Personal Care
care.desc: Your safety and well-being are our priority. We adapt every reservation to your tastes, allergies, or specific preferences.

ArmaAventuraSection.title: Tailor-made travel assistance Your personal concierge in Mexico
ArmaAventuraSection.description: Forget about planning everything on your own and worrying about schedules or reservations. With our personalized assistance service, we adapt every detail of your trip according to your tastes, time, and budget. You tell us what kind of experiences you're looking for, and we take care of the rest.
ArmaAventuraSection.list_title: What we can do for you:

itineraries.label: Custom itineraries:
itineraries.text: We design your trip day by day according to your interests, from adventures, beaches, gastronomy, culture, to wellness activities.

restaurants.label: Restaurants:
restaurants.text: We show you the best local spots and make reservations so you can just enjoy.

transport.label: Transportation:
transport.text: We organize transfers, car rentals, and private transportation without complications.

tours.label: Exclusive tours:
tours.text: We manage experiences with priority access and VIP options.

CotizacionSection.title: Do you already have a quote?
CotizacionSection.description: If you already have a quote sent by your concierge, click the button below. Enter your budget details and process your payment quickly and securely.

ContactAventura.title:
How can we
help you today?
ContactAventura.subtitle: Whether you have a quick question or want us to design your next big trip, we are here to make your visit to Mexico unforgettable.

success.title: Received!
success.message: Our team will get in touch with you in less than 24 hours.

Quote.subject: Inquiry Confirmation
Quote.title: Request Received
Quote.greeting: Hello {name}, we are designing a personalized proposal for {experience}. A concierge will contact you shortly.
Quote.disclaimer: This is an automated receipt. No reply is necessary.

payQuote.description: This section is exclusive to clients who already have an itinerary and budget sent by their concierge.
payQuote.step1: 1. Amount: Enter the total agreed amount in the price box (VAT included).
payQuote.step2: 2. Reference: Enter your folio number or package name in the text field.
payQuote.step3: 3. Security: Click “Add to Cart” to proceed to encrypted payment.
payQuote.assistanceText: If you have any questions about this tour or need assistance making your reservation, we will be happy to help.
payQuote.checkoutSubtitle: Enter the details of your agreed quote
payQuote.statusExternal: EXTERNAL FOLIO: ENTER THE AGREED AMOUNT
payQuote.confirmationDisclaimer: By adding to the bag, you confirm that the folio and amount correspond to the quote sent by our Wonder MX team.
